name: Seal of the Pilgrim
description: History Before Exalt Version 1.1.0.0 (Sep 2020), this seal lacked a HP Boost. It has received new WisMod formulas.
effects: On party: Healing, Damaging and HP Boost HP Boost: +20 (+2 per WIS over 50) max HP HP Boost Range: 4.5 (+1 per 10 WIS over 50) tiles HP Boost Duration: 2.5 (+1 per 10 WIS over 50) seconds Healing & Damaging Range: 4.5 (+0.1 per WIS over 50) tiles Healing & Damaging Duration: 3 (+0.1 per WIS over 50) seconds
